title: baccharoides calvoana subsp. usambarensis
intro: Baccharoides calvoana subsp. usambarensis, commonly known as the Usambarensis Baccharis, is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The Usambarensis Baccharis has been used in traditional medicine to promote digestion, relieve menstrual cramps, and boost the immune system, offering various health benefits to those who consume it. The herbal preparation of Baccharoides calvoana subsp. usambarensis typically involves making teas or infusions from its leaves, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
